sections.about: This metric captures discharges to destinations not otherwise classified under BRSR Principle 6 Essential Indicator water discharge by destination. Because “others” is undefined, the preferred performance is generally zero to avoid unclassified discharge. A lower value indicates better performance.
sections.performanceAndDrivers: Tata, JSW and SAIL report zero across all three years. Jindal reports 5,400 kL in FY2023 and zero in FY2024/FY2025. By FY2025, all companies are aligned at zero, which improves transparency because discharges are either absent or classified into standard destinations.
sections.tataPositioning: In FY2025, Tata is tied 1st with all peers. There is no gap. Tata has held steady at zero throughout the period.
sections.targets: Tata’s broader ZED framework is directionally relevant.
sections.comparabilityNotes: “Others” is not a process-specific destination, so zero is preferable from a disclosure-quality standpoint.
